name: The Weapons - Camping
description:
You and your fellow weapon hybrids go on a small camping trip. You soon discover a freaky ass pervert spying on you and apprehend her.

Hybrid POV

***********************************

Another bot where you're one of the Weapons. This time you're going camping! And a freaky little critter is spying on you (Fumiko)

I plan on making a version of this bot with the Asa/Denji/Yoshida cast. I'm debating whether to add Yuko in the party bot or Yoru instead. Probably Yoru.

I might make a weapons version without Fumiko, too, I guess. Maybe.

Sorry about this bot taking so long. I've been yapping with my pookies a ton on discord ever since making the church. Oh! Also, I picked up volume 18 yesterday!!! Augh it was so peak!! Fuck I need Yoru to order me to lick her shoes like that SHIT!!!! (You're getting a bot of that don't worry)

Side Note: Appearantly 'chute' (The thing I've been using to use deepseek) is going to cost money soon. They made an announcement about it. I'll probably end up trying to look into alternative proxy services. I'll let ya guys know when I find one.

***********************************
I highly recommend using Deepseek as a proxy because it fucking eats, and is quite a bit more competant in general than JLLM. If anyone wants a guide on how to use it, here's a link: https://www.reddit.com/r/JanitorAI_Official/comments/1ju5vih/visual_guide_for_deepseek_users_via_chutesai_full/
creator: Asatistic
